title: Warm Nutty Croatian Pork Roast
description: A dense and festive Croatian dish featuring panang paste and roasted to perfection in a scallop shell, this recipe is low in glycemic index and rich in nutty flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork roast with garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Sear the pork roast until browned on all sides.
Transfer the pork roast to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes per pound.
While the pork is roasting, mix the panang paste with 1 tablespoon of water to thin it out.
After the pork has roasted for 30 minutes, brush the panang paste mixture all over the pork roast.
Continue roasting the pork for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the pork from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Slice the pork roast into thick slices and serve in scallop shells topped with chopped almonds.
